Uses of Interface
com.societegenerale.failover.core.report.ReportPublisher

Packages that use ReportPublisher
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.report
Reporting and metrics publication for the failover lifecycle.

  • Uses of ReportPublisher in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return ReportPublisher
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReportPublisher
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.loggerReportPublisher()
    Registers a ReportPublisher that writes failover reports to SLF4J.
    ReportPublisher
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.metricsReportPublisher()
    Registers a ReportPublisher that records failover metrics (counters/gauges).
    Method parameters in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with type arguments of type ReportPublisher
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompositeReportPublisher
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.compositeReportPublisher(List<ReportPublisher> reportPublishers, FailoverClock clock)
    Registers a composite publisher that stamps the publish timestamp once and broadcasts to every ReportPublisher in the context.

  • Uses of ReportPublisher in com.societegenerale.failover.core.report

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.report that implement ReportPublisher
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractReportPublisher
    Base ReportPublisher that delegates publishing to AbstractReportPublisher.doPublish(com.societegenerale.failover.core.report.Metrics).
    class 
    CompositeReportPublisher
    ReportPublisher that stamps the publish timestamp once and fans metrics out to a list of delegate publishers.
    class 
    LoggerReportPublisher
    AbstractReportPublisher that writes failover metrics to the SLF4J logger at INFO level.
    class 
    MetricsReportPublisher
    AbstractReportPublisher that emits failover metrics as a technical Event via MDC-based structured logging.
    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.core.report with parameters of type ReportPublisher
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DefaultFailoverReporter(ReportPublisher reportPublisher, FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverClock clock, ManifestInfoExtractor manifestInfoExtractor, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, Map<String,String> additionalInfo)
    Creates a reporter with all required collaborators.
    Constructor parameters in com.societegenerale.failover.core.report with type arguments of type ReportPublisher
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    CompositeReportPublisher(List<ReportPublisher> delegates, FailoverClock clock)
    Creates a composite publisher that forwards to each delegate in order.
